info.title: Citedy Agent API
info.description: Public contract for Citedy agent integrations. This contract reflects the current /api/agent surface without changing runtime behavior.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Webhook endpoint registration and delivery logs

tags.name: Schedule
tags.description: Content schedule timeline and gap analysis

tags.name: Status
tags.description: Operational readiness and actionable onboarding status

tags.name: SEO Tools
tags.description: Agent-authenticated SEO diagnostics tools exposed via MCP seo.* namespace.

tags.name: GSC
tags.description: Google Search Console integration and reporting

post.description: Flow A: creates a pending registration and returns approval URL. No API key is returned here.
Flow A step 2. Requires authenticated tenant owner session (dashboard auth), not agent API key.

410.description: Pending registration expired or not found

get.summary: Get agent info, balance and limits

post.description: Generate an article from a topic or source URLs. Returns status 'publishing' when auto_publish is true (default) or 'generated' when auto_publish is false (draft mode). The final 'published' status is reflected in GET /api/agent/articles/{id} after the publish pipeline completes.

202.description: Article generation accepted for async processing. Poll GET /api/agent/articles/{id} for status.

get.summary: Long-poll wait for lead magnet completion
get.description: Hangs open up to 25s polling for generation completion. Call immediately after POST /lead-magnets. Returns full result when ready, progress on timeout, or error on failure.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Lead magnet run ID from POST response

200.description: Lead magnet result, progress, or failure

post.description: Returns 202 for new jobs or 200 for cached results (dedup hit).

get.description: Streams the raw content file from R2 storage. Primary response is a binary octet-stream; some content types may return JSON.

200.description: Raw content stream from R2 storage

post.description: Returns 202 if at least one URL succeeded, 400 if all failed.

post.summary: Publish, schedule, cancel, or direct-publish (as-is) social content

get.summary: Identify days with fewer posts than target

post.summary: Create micro-content post with social adaptations

post.description: Search X/Twitter, web, and HackerNews for trending content. Credit cost: fast=2, deep=4, ultra=6.

get.description: Returns actionable status snapshot for credits, social connections, schedule, knowledge base and content readiness.

delete.summary: Delete product knowledge document by ID

post.description: Starts short-form video generation and returns immediate processing status for polling.

get.summary: Get shorts generation status by ID

post.summary: Merge shorts videos and add subtitles
Publish short video to YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, and/or TikTok
Plan internal links from page + targets
Check sitemap availability and robots.txt hints
Start async AI brand visibility scan

get.summary: Get queued article generation status or result by ID
get.description: Poll for the status of a queued article generation job. Returns processing status while the article is being generated, or the final result (success/failure) once complete.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The job ID returned by POST /api/agent/autopilot when wait_for_completion is false

200.description: Job status or completed article result

patch.description: Set article status back to 'generated'. The article remains in the system but is removed from the public blog. Only articles with status 'published' can be unpublished; attempting to unpublish an article in any other status returns 400.

409.description: Article is not in the required state for this operation

delete.description: Permanently delete an article regardless of its current status (generated, published, failed, etc.). Performs cascading cleanup: removes the article database record and associated storage files (illustrations, voice-overs) on a best-effort basis. This operation is permanent and cannot be undone.

post.description: Trigger the publish pipeline for a draft article (status=generated). The article will be available on the public blog shortly after.

409.description: Article is not in the required state for this operation

get.description: Returns Google Search Console performance report with clicks, impressions, CTR, positions, top queries, top pages, movers, opportunities, and article suggestions. Returns connect URL if GSC is not linked. Free (0 credits).

parameters.name: force_refresh
parameters.description: Force fresh GSC data fetch instead of cached morning report

200.description: GSC report (connected) or connect URL (not connected)

BadGateway.description: Bad gateway -- upstream storage fetch failed

topup.description: Recommended credit top-up package with billing URL

recommended_package_price_usd.description: Price of the recommended package in USD

topup_url.description: URL to billing page with package pre-selected

id.description: Social account UUID — use as accountId when publishing

ScoutResponseBase.description: Shared fields for all scout responses.

wait_for_completion.description: Wait synchronously for article completion before returning. When false, returns 202 with a job ID for polling via GET /api/agent/articles/{id}.

auto_publish.description: Publish article immediately after generation. When false, article stays as draft (status=generated). Uses tenant setting when omitted.

article_url.description: URL where the article will be accessible once published. For draft articles (auto_publish: false), this URL will return 404 until the article is published.

status.description: publishing — article generation complete, publish pipeline triggered (will be live within seconds). generated — draft article, not yet published (use article.publish to make it live).

adaptationId.description: Adaptation UUID — pass directly to publish endpoint

accountId.description: Social account UUID — pass directly to publish endpoint (null if not connected)

LeadMagnetGeneratingResponse.description: Returned while the lead magnet is still being generated.

LeadMagnetCompletedResponse.description: Returned when the lead magnet is completed, published, or archived.

scheduledAt.description: Required if action=schedule. Must be a future date.

PublishRawRequest.description: Direct publish article content as-is to a social platform. No AI adaptation, 0 credits.

messageId.description: QStash message ID for scheduled publish

deduplicated.description: True if publish was skipped because already published

warning.description: Present when publish_raw encounters a non-fatal issue

scheduledAt.description: Must be future date if provided

article_id.description: Optional article ID. When provided, shorts_video_url is saved to article metadata on completion.
Optional article ID. When provided, shorts_title, shorts_hashtags, and shorts_script are saved to article metadata.

script.description: Voiceover script text (also used as post description)

title.description: Catchy video title (max 100 chars), used as YouTube/TikTok title

prompt_used.description: Full image prompt used for this generation (same input params can yield different prompts for diversity).

variation_tags.description: Server-sampled appearance and location tags for debugging and diversity checks.

video_url.description: HTTPS URL of the video on download.citedy.com or Supabase storage

speech_text.description: Spoken text from the video for metadata generation

targets.description: Platforms to publish to (max 3). Duplicate platforms are rejected by runtime validation.

privacy_status.description: Publish privacy. YouTube supports public/unlisted/private; TikTok currently requires private until app review approves public posting; Instagram Reels ignores this field.

metadata_provider.description: LLM provider used for metadata generation

metadata_degraded.description: True if AI metadata generation failed and static fallback was used

phrases.description: Must contain exactly one phrase per video URL

targetUrls.description: Known target URLs for internal link opportunity analysis.

sitemapUrl.description: Optional sitemap URL used when targetUrls are not provided.

status.description: processing — generation in progress. generated — draft, not yet published. publishing — publish pipeline triggered. published — live on blog. failed — generation or publish failed.

article_url.description: URL where the article will be accessible once published. Returns 404 for draft (generated) articles until published.
